name: Local Image Generator
description: Generate images locally — SD-Turbo (WebGPU) and FLUX.2 (mflux), no external server, no cloud.

scripts.gate: npm run typecheck && npm test && npm run lint && npm run build
scripts.deploy: npm run build && cp main.js manifest.json styles.css "${OBSIDIAN_PLUGIN_DIR:?set OBSIDIAN_PLUGIN_DIR}"/

author: Johannes Kaindl
